name: ClipDrop API
what_it_does: Stability AI's ClipDrop API offering multiple AI image operations: background removal, image upscaling, inpainting, reimagine, sketch-to-image, and text-to-image generation.
use_cases: Image upscaling for print or high-res display
Inpainting for automated image repair or object removal
not_for: High-volume enterprise workloads requiring SLA guarantees
best_when: Multi-operation image processing pipelines where you need background removal, upscaling, and generation from a single provider.
avoid_when: You only need one specific operation and want the simplest possible API, or need guaranteed uptime SLAs.

auth.notes: Simple API key in x-api-key header. No scopes — all operations share one key. Free tier available.

pricing.notes: Credit-based pricing varies by operation type. Background removal and upscaling are cheaper than generation.

agent_readiness.error_message_notes: HTTP status codes are mostly correct. Error JSON bodies are present but inconsistent across endpoints. Some endpoints return HTML errors on malformed requests.
agent_readiness.idempotency_notes: Image operations are deterministic for same input; safe to retry
known_agent_gotchas: No SDK means agents must handle multipart/form-data encoding manually
Different endpoints have different required fields — no unified schema
No retry-after header on rate limit responses
Stability AI ownership may affect long-term API stability

security_score_components.security_notes: Simple API key with no scope granularity. Single key controls all operations. No webhook signatures to verify. TLS enforced. No documented secret rotation process.
